movies.title: Steel Magnolias
movies.review: I never know what’s supposed to be funny on purpose and what’s only funny because I’m watching this 30 years later, ya know?

movies.title: I Saw the TV Glow
movies.review: I saw… a different movie to everyone else apparently cause wth was that. First 1/3rd was fun and interesting but absolutely lost me in the second half.

movies.title: Twinless
movies.review: Interesting premise but sort of felt exhausting as the audience.

movies.title: Hard Truths
movies.review: I found this so unbearably hard to watch, Pansy is so angry at the world it makes it very unenjoyable to sit through. Not sure the payoff was worth it for me.

movies.title: Click
movies.review: Haven’t rewatched since childhood. I can see why it was so funny and quotable when I was 12 but weow it hasn’t all aged well.

merge_variables.latest_review: I never know what’s supposed to be funny on purpose and what’s only funny because I’m watching this 30 years later, ya know?
